sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Getafe has struggled recently, losing 4 of their last 5 matches with only 1 win, showing defensive vulnerabilities (conceding in all 5). Celta Vigo, in better form, has won 3 of their last 5, scoring consistently (3+ goals in 3 matches) but also conceding regularly.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head matches, results are split with Celta Vigo winning the most recent 1-0 at home, and Getafe winning 3-2 earlier at home. Matches tend to be competitive with goals on both sides in recent encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Celta Vigo (7th, 52 points) outperforms Getafe (13th, 42 points) in attack, with 57 goals scored vs Getafe’s 33. Getafe’s defense is slightly tighter (37 goals conceded vs Celta’s 56), but their low possession and attacking output may hinder them.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Trends
sections.text: Celta’s Iago Aspas remains a threat with a high average rating (7.2) and recent contributions, while Getafe’s Mauro Arambarri (10 goals) could be pivotal. Both teams see frequent cards and low corner counts in matches.
